data.title: Trump Plays Presidential Immunity Card In Truth Social Lawsuit Battle
data.description: Donald Trump is seeking presidential immunity to pause a lawsuit over alleged unfair dilution of stakes in Trump Media & Technology Group, citing presidential privilege in a case involving former "The Apprentice" contestants.

data.title: Donald Trump Tried To Block 'The Apprentice' From Movie Theaters, Film Gets 2 Golden Globe Nominations
data.description: Sebastian Stan played Donald Trump on film in the movie "The Apprentice." The movie could score Stan his first Golden Globe win.

data.title: The Price Is Right: This Weed Real Estate Stock Proves Conservative Strategies Bring Returns
data.description: New Lake Capital Partners (OTC:NLCP), a real estate company focused on cannabis properties, offers an attractive investment with a 9.1% dividend yield, well above the return on 10-year government bonds.
